title: Noether Stage Specification
description: JSON format for noether stage add <spec.json>

id.description: SHA-256 content hash of the stage signature (64 hex chars)

input.description: NType — input type of the stage

output.description: NType — output type of the stage

description.description: Natural language description for semantic search

lifecycle.description: Initial lifecycle state; Draft stages are not used in compositions

ed25519_signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature over the stage ID. Auto-generated by noether stage add if absent.

signer_public_key.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key of the signer

implementation_code.description: Source code of the implementation (for synthesized/user-authored stages)

implementation_language.description: Language of the implementation: python, javascript, bash, etc.
